text:
Moving or speaking so slowly: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has been moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the
opposite - being so fidgety or restless that they have been moving around a lot
more than usual. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day) effective 10/01/2023
881 THGHT_BETTER_DD_CD THGHT_BETTER_DD_CD D0150I1 Mood:
